name: Resolution pathway and tissue repair bootstrap for June 2, 2026
summary: Submitted bootstrap bundle establishing the first public baseline candidate for the resolution pathway and tissue repair track.

scope.question: What is the current human-relevant evidence landscape for Resolution Pathway and Tissue Repair, and what belongs in the first public baseline?

proposed_changes.summary: Add Resolvin D1 intervention record.
proposed_changes.rationale: RvD1 anchors direct preclinical pro-resolving mediator repair evidence for the track.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Maresin 1 intervention record.
proposed_changes.rationale: MaR1 anchors direct preclinical aged bone-repair evidence for the track.

proposed_changes.summary: Add SPM-enriched marine oil intervention record.
proposed_changes.rationale: SPM-enriched marine oil supplies direct human target-engagement and leukocyte phenotype evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add EPA+DHA oral supplementation intervention record.
proposed_changes.rationale: EPA+DHA is the human wound-repair precursor strategy with chronic venous leg ulcer biomarker data.

proposed_changes.summary: Add aged mouse resolution-deficit source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source anchors the age-related inflammation-resolution deficit and nano-proresolving medicine mechanism.

proposed_changes.summary: Add aged muscle RvD1 repair source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source anchors direct RvD1 animal support for aged tissue repair.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Maresin 1 aged bone regeneration source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source anchors direct MaR1 animal support for aged fracture repair.

proposed_changes.summary: Add enriched marine oil healthy-volunteer SPM source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supplies randomized human SPM target-engagement evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add SPM Active healthy-volunteer registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The registry documents current posted results and trial metadata for the healthy-volunteer SPM study.

proposed_changes.summary: Add SPM Active obesity bioavailability source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supplies middle-aged and older-adult human SPM-pathway target-engagement evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add SPM Active obesity registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The registry records posted results and trial metadata for the SPM Active obesity bioavailability study.

proposed_changes.summary: Add marine oil PAD leukocyte phenotype source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supplies human disease-adjacent lipid mediator and leukocyte phenotype support.

proposed_changes.summary: Add OMEGA-SPM PAD registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The registry records current no-posted-results status for the PAD and SPM Emulsion study.

proposed_changes.summary: Add EPA+DHA chronic venous leg ulcer cytokine source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source anchors human inflammatory cytokine lowering in a chronic wound population.

proposed_changes.summary: Add EPA+DHA chronic venous leg ulcer PMN source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This DOI-backed source anchors wound-fluid PMN activation and wound-area trend evidence without forcing an incorrect PubMed ID.

proposed_changes.summary: Add completed older-adult omega-3 venous-ulcer registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The registry is a key translation watch item because it is completed but has no posted results as of June 2, 2026.

proposed_changes.summary: Add aged mouse resolution study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study maps age-impaired resolution and proresolving medicine response to the track.

proposed_changes.summary: Add RvD1 aged muscle injury study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study maps direct RvD1 treatment to aged muscle repair and force-recovery endpoints.

proposed_changes.summary: Add MaR1 aged fracture healing study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study maps direct MaR1 treatment to aged bone repair endpoints.

proposed_changes.summary: Add SPM-enriched marine oil healthy-volunteer study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study anchors the strongest controlled human SPM target-engagement evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add SPM Active obesity bioavailability study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study supplies human SPM-pathway biomarker support in a middle-aged and older adult obesity cohort.

proposed_changes.summary: Add SPM Emulsion PAD and healthy-volunteer study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study captures disease-adjacent human SPM biomarker and leukocyte phenotype support.

proposed_changes.summary: Add EPA+DHA chronic venous leg ulcer pilot study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study links omega-3 precursor supplementation to human wound inflammation endpoints.

proposed_changes.summary: Add completed older-adult EPA+DHA venous-ulcer registry study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: This study is the key current translation watch item for possible human functional-benefit upgrade.

proposed_changes.summary: Add aged-mouse resolution deficit finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding establishes the age-linked resolution biology behind the track.

proposed_changes.summary: Add RvD1 aged muscle recovery finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding anchors direct RvD1 aged-animal functional repair support.

proposed_changes.summary: Add MaR1 aged bone repair finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding anchors direct MaR1 aged-animal functional repair support.

proposed_changes.summary: Add human SPM target-engagement finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding supports human_biomarker_signal for the track.

proposed_changes.summary: Add SPM Active obesity target-engagement finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding adds middle-aged and older adult human biomarker support while preserving uncontrolled-study limits.

proposed_changes.summary: Add PAD marine-oil leukocyte phenotype finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding broadens human biomarker support to a disease-adjacent vascular cohort.

proposed_changes.summary: Add EPA+DHA cytokine-lowering finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding supports human inflammatory biomarker movement in a chronic wound cohort.

proposed_changes.summary: Add EPA+DHA wound-fluid PMN finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding captures human wound-microenvironment biomarker support and the bounded wound-area trend.

proposed_changes.summary: Add no-posted-results boundary finding for the completed larger trial.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding prevents over-interpreting the completed older-adult wound trial before results are public.

proposed_changes.summary: Create the first public outlook for the Resolution Pathway and Tissue Repair track.
proposed_changes.rationale: A low-confidence human_biomarker_signal baseline is justified by human SPM and omega-3 biomarker evidence, while functional repair claims remain bounded by animal evidence and missing larger-trial results.
uncertainty_flags: Direct RvD1 and MaR1 repair evidence is animal-level.
Human evidence is mostly biomarker or target-engagement evidence.
SPM-enriched marine oil and EPA+DHA precursor supplementation should not be treated as direct SPM efficacy.
NCT03576989 is completed but lacks posted results as of the June 2, 2026 API view.

proposed_outlook_implications.note: Create the first public track outlook at low-confidence human_biomarker_signal because human SPM and omega-3 studies support target engagement and inflammatory-resolution biomarkers, while direct tissue repair efficacy remains animal-level or unconfirmed.
Publishing this bundle would broaden chronic inflammation coverage beyond cytokine/inflammasome suppression and immune rejuvenation with an active-resolution and tissue-repair track.

next_actions: Publication complete. Review downstream pages if this change affects shared surfaces.
